# Weekly Status Update Template

Use this template every week during project execution to keep stakeholders informed. Send via the agreed channel (email, Slack, project board comment, etc.).

See [Risk Management & Communication](../octoacme-risks-and-communication.md) for communication cadence guidance.

---

## Status Update — Week of [DATE]

**Project:** [Project Name]
**PM (Project Manager):** [Name]
**PdM (Product Manager):** [Name]
**Status:** 🟢 On Track / 🟡 At Risk / 🔴 Off Track
